variables.clothing_signature: minimalist quality — black t-shirt, dark jeans, leather jacket

anatomic_anchor.face_shape: oblong with strong jawline, masculine angles

eyes.color: piercing grey with steel blue undertones
eyes.eyelids: heavy upper lids, natural hooded look
eyes.eyebrows: thick, straight, dark, low set — creates intense expression

anatomic_anchor.nose: strong straight bridge, slightly aquiline, masculine tip
anatomic_anchor.lips: thin upper lip, fuller lower lip, natural pale pink, rarely smiles fully
anatomic_anchor.jaw: strong square jaw, visible masseter muscles, slight cleft chin
anatomic_anchor.skin_texture: slightly rough, visible pores on nose and cheeks, light acne scars on jawline, sun-tanned
distinguishing_features: permanent light stubble (5 o'clock shadow even after shaving)
small scar above right eyebrow (barely visible)
intense piercing gaze — eyes seem to evaluate
anatomic_anchor.visual_signature: oblong face, hooded grey eyes, strong aquiline nose, square jaw, light stubble, short dark hair, athletic muscular build, black minimalist clothing
